prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: investigation board. Story world: Static Between Stations. Premise: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices.. Setting: Abandoned commuter rail control annex. Threat presence: The Curator of Static. Recurring motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes. Puzzle visual for "Relay Cipher Split". Objective: Combine three relay fragments distributed across party channels.. Build layered clue board where each shard can be solved collaboratively.. Subgenre: psychological horror. Tone: CINEMATIC. Immediate scene brief: Static Between Stations - Relay Cipher Split Puzzle Board. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Show a physical evidence-board or clue collage with photographs, string, maps, stained paper, and marked surfaces. Prioritize tactile realism over readable text. Any writing should be minimal, blurred, or partially obscured.
source_prompt: Story: Static Between Stations (static-between-stations) | Hook: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices. | Subgenre: psychological horror | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Abandoned commuter rail control annex | Villain: The Curator of Static | Villain worldview: Truth is only what survives the loudest channel. | Motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes.
